### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` — fixed SDK child session header writing so it can create the JSONL header when `SessionManager.create()` has not flushed the file yet; preserves `parentSession`, `projectId`, `spaceId`, and `studioChild` metadata. - `lib/types.ts` — no changes needed. #### Verification - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed. #### Notes / Risks - The fix marks the SDK `SessionManager` as flushed after manually creating the header, preventing later SDK persistence from using exclusive create (`wx`) against an already-created file. - Remaining subtasks for fallback diagnostics and validation/docs were not implemented, per assigned boundary.

### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` — fixed SDK child session header writing so it can create the JSONL header when `SessionManager.create()` has not flushed the file yet; preserves `parentSession`, `projectId`, `spaceId`, and `studioChild` metadata.
- `lib/types.ts` — no changes needed.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

#### Notes / Risks

- The fix marks the SDK `SessionManager` as flushed after manually creating the header, preventing later SDK persistence from using exclusive create (`wx`) against an already-created file.
- Remaining subtasks for fallback diagnostics and validation/docs were not implemented, per assigned boundary.

### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — implemented runner-error-persistence: - Preserves SDK preflight/fallback warnings across CLI fallback progress/final snapshots. - Writes fallback diagnostic status into transcript sidecar when available. - Persists forced `runner=sdk` preflight/runner failures as failed runs with `error`, `terminationReason`, failed transcript metadata, and progress warnings. - Registers an early SDK placeholder runtime handle to avoid async poll/collect racing into `runtime_lost`. - Exposes progress warnings in lifecycle/wait compact projections. #### Verification - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed - `npm run lint` — passed #### Notes / Risks - Did not modify unrelated files already present in the working tree. - No manual Studio smoke run performed in this delegated subtask.

### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — implemented runner-error-persistence:
  - Preserves SDK preflight/fallback warnings across CLI fallback progress/final snapshots.
  - Writes fallback diagnostic status into transcript sidecar when available.
  - Persists forced `runner=sdk` preflight/runner failures as failed runs with `error`, `terminationReason`, failed transcript metadata, and progress warnings.
  - Registers an early SDK placeholder runtime handle to avoid async poll/collect racing into `runtime_lost`.
  - Exposes progress warnings in lifecycle/wait compact projections.

#### Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Did not modify unrelated files already present in the working tree.
- No manual Studio smoke run performed in this delegated subtask.

已完成检查，产物已写入： - `.ypi/tasks/20260707-160855-修复-ypi-studio-sdk-runner-preflight-回退-cli-问题/review.md` 检查范围： - `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-header.ts` - `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts` - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` - `scripts/test-ypi-studio-sdk-runner.mjs` - `package.json` - `docs/modules/library.md` - `docs/modules/api.md` 验证结果： - `npm run test:studio-sdk-runner` — passed - `npm run lint` — passed - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed 结论： - Pass - 代码已覆盖本任务核心验收： - SDK child session header 在 JSONL 未落盘时可安全创建 - `auto` fallback 保留 SDK preflight 诊断到 run progress/warnings - 强制 `sdk` 的 async preflight/runner 失败会持久化为真实 failed，而不是只剩 `runtime_lost` - 文档与验证脚本已补齐 剩余风险： - 非阻塞：`lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` 新增的 SDK 预注册占位 handle 修复了 `runtime_lost`，但若用户恰好在 SDK preflight 极短窗口内取消 async run，占位 `abort` 目前是 no-op，后续真实 handle 可能覆盖已取消状态。当前不影响本任务验收，但建议主会话决定是否补一个后续小修。 主会话需要决策： - 是否接受上述“SDK preflight 期间 async cancel 窄窗口竞态”为后续优化，而不是本任务阻塞项。

已完成检查，产物已写入：

- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-160855-修复-ypi-studio-sdk-runner-preflight-回退-cli-问题/review.md`

检查范围：

- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-header.ts`
- `lib/ypi-studio-child-session-runner.ts`
- `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts`
- `scripts/test-ypi-studio-sdk-runner.mjs`
- `package.json`
- `docs/modules/library.md`
- `docs/modules/api.md`

验证结果：

- `npm run test:studio-sdk-runner` — passed
- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

结论：

- Pass
- 代码已覆盖本任务核心验收：  
  - SDK child session header 在 JSONL 未落盘时可安全创建
  - `auto` fallback 保留 SDK preflight 诊断到 run progress/warnings
  - 强制 `sdk` 的 async preflight/runner 失败会持久化为真实 failed，而不是只剩 `runtime_lost`
  - 文档与验证脚本已补齐

剩余风险：

- 非阻塞：`lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` 新增的 SDK 预注册占位 handle 修复了 `runtime_lost`，但若用户恰好在 SDK preflight 极短窗口内取消 async run，占位 `abort` 目前是 no-op，后续真实 handle 可能覆盖已取消状态。当前不影响本任务验收，但建议主会话决定是否补一个后续小修。

主会话需要决策：

- 是否接受上述“SDK preflight 期间 async cancel 窄窗口竞态”为后续优化，而不是本任务阻塞项。
Checker verdict Pass；所有必要验证通过，进入待收尾。
